text.title: AI Coding Agent Handoff Protocol Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply AI Coding Agent Handoff Protocol end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: write-task
step.action: Author TASK.md with brief, allowed paths, forbidden, AC, rollback.

step.name: run-agent
step.action: Execute the agent within the bounded scope.

step.name: review
step.action: Human reviews diff against AC; records verdict.

step.name: merge-or-rollback
step.action: Merge on pass; otherwise execute rollback plan.
